title: This London Open Setup Printed 3R Before Breakfast (April 2026)
description: Monday London open is the most manipulated session of the week — and smart money does the same thing every time. R2F Trading breaks down the exact order block + FVG combo that funded traders watch while everyone else is guessing. Watch before your next trade. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily setups.
script: Stop. Before Monday's open — check this one thing. London just swept Friday's high. Most traders bought that. They got trapped. This is buyside liquidity being hunted. Smart money needed those stops. Now watch what happens next. Price drops straight into a bearish order block. Four-hour structure. Left from last Tuesday. This is where institutions sell. Inside that order block — a fair value gap. Unmitigated. Price wicked right into it. That's your entry signal. Stop loss above the order block. Six pips of risk. Target — the trendline liquidity sitting below. Clean market structure break confirmed. Price expanded bearish. Hit the target in 47 minutes. That's a 3R result. Before most traders even opened their charts. The R2F Trading system finds these every week. Follow R2F Trading. New setups drop daily at r2ftrading.com.
